goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'hobsons house'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '8 people' and '3 nights' starting from 'sunday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'stansted airport' and should 'arrive by 13:15'.
The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called hobsons house
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 8 people and 3 nights starting from sunday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to stansted airport and should arrive by 13:15
The train should leave on wednesday and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get travel time and departure time
